name: Roasted Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. Halve the tomatoes and place them on a baking sheet.
3. Roast for 1 hour.
4. Mix the olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
5. Remove the tomatoes from the oven and sprinkle the mixture over them.
6. Add a sprinkling of freshly ground pepper.
7. Return the tomatoes to the oven for 1 hour more, or until they are soft and caramelized around the edges.
8. Store covered in olive oil in a sealed container in the refrigerator. They will keep for at least a week.
9. These work well with plum tomatoes, but any tomato variety will do. I typically use a mix from my garden.
